strategy.name: RLS Private Indicator Strategy
strategy.description: Signal-based strategy driven entirely by the RLS private TradingView indicator. RLS Buy fires a long entry; RLS Sell fires a short entry. The next opposing RLS signal closes the current position. Hard stop loss at 25% from entry.

indicators.rls: Private TradingView indicator. Emits two signals: 'RLS Buy' (bullish, enter long) and 'RLS Sell' (bearish, enter short). No other indicators required — RLS signal is the single source of truth.

long: RLS indicator has fired an 'RLS Buy' signal on the current bar
No existing long position is open
short: RLS indicator has fired an 'RLS Sell' signal on the current bar
No existing short position is open

exit_rules: Close long position when RLS fires an 'RLS Sell' signal
Close short position when RLS fires an 'RLS Buy' signal
Hard stop loss: exit immediately if trade moves 25% against entry price
Do not exit on any other condition — only RLS signal flip or stop loss
risk_rules: Hard stop loss is 25% from entry — non-negotiable, always set at order time
Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
Paper trade first — validate RLS signals on your specific asset before going live
RLS is a private indicator — confirm it is active and publishing signals on your TradingView chart before each run
notes: This strategy is entirely signal-driven. The bot does not evaluate price, volume, or any other indicator — it only acts on RLS Buy and RLS Sell alerts from TradingView. Ensure TradingView alerts are configured to fire on every RLS signal and are connected via the MCP.
